members: computer_science_engineering:Genome Analysis - We are embarking on an innovative venture to develop energy-efficient genome analysis solutions through hardware/software co-design

computer_science_engineering:specifically targeting low-power and affordable platforms. The focus is on genome assembly and downstream analysis using data generated from 2nd and 3rd generation sequencing technology. In additions
computer_science_engineering:we intent to develop affordable hardware-based metagenomic and anti-microbial resistance monitoring pipelines

computer_science_engineering:Battery Management System - Improving the battery management system (BMS) in electric vehicles (EVs) through the integration of machine learning (ML) via hardware/software co-design at the edge holds great potential for enhancing the overall performance of EVs. By leveraging ML in the BMS
computer_science_engineering:several key areas can be targeted to achieve longer battery life

reports.text:
Community 6 in IIT Jammu Computer Science & Engineering Department:
  Faculty: Sidharth Maheshwari
  ResearchArea: Genome Analysis, Hardware-Software Co-Design, Battery Management Systems, Machine Learning (Tsetlin Machines), Genome Analysis - We are embarking on an innovative venture to develop energy-efficient genome analysis solutions through hardware/software co-design, specifically targeting low-power and affordable platforms. The focus is on genome assembly and downstream analysis using data generated from 2nd and 3rd generation sequencing technology. In additions, we intent to develop affordable hardware-based metagenomic and anti-microbial resistance monitoring pipelines, Battery Management System - Improving the battery management system (BMS) in electric vehicles (EVs) through the integration of machine learning (ML) via hardware/software co-design at the edge holds great potential for enhancing the overall performance of EVs. By leveraging ML in the BMS, several key areas can be targeted to achieve longer battery life, efficient charge capacity utilization
  Relationships: RESEARCHES_IN: 10

Summary: This group includes 1 faculty member(s): computer_science_engineering:Sidharth Maheshwari. working in areas like computer_science_engineering:Genome Analysis, computer_science_engineering:Hardware-Software Co-Design, computer_science_engineering:Battery Management Systems.
reports.summary: This group includes 1 faculty member(s): computer_science_engineering:Sidharth Maheshwari. working in areas like computer_science_engineering:Genome Analysis, computer_science_engineering:Hardware-Software Co-Design, computer_science_engineering:Battery Management Systems.
